mapper.select: SELECT c.*, g.group_name, s.service_name FROM biz_group_competitor c LEFT JOIN crm_group g ON c.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN biz_service s ON c.service_id = s.id WHERE c.id = #{id} AND c.deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_group_competitor (id, group_id, service_id, competitor_name, stat_month, quantity, remark, status, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted_flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{groupId}, #{serviceId}, #{competitorName}, #{statMonth}, #{quantity}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), #{updatedBy}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_group_competitor SET service_id = #{serviceId}, competitor_name = #{competitorName}, stat_month = #{statMonth}, quantity = #{quantity}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_group_competitor SET status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE biz_group_competitor SET deleted_flag = 1, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT s.change_type AS changeType, s.before_competitor_name AS beforeCompetitorName, s.after_competitor_name AS afterCompetitorName, s.before_quantity AS beforeQuantity, s.after_quantity AS afterQuantity, s.before_stat_month AS beforeStatMonth, s.after_stat_month AS afterStatMonth, t.submit_time AS changeTime FROM wf_ticket_competitor_snapshot s JOIN wf_ticket t ON s.ticket_id = t.id WHERE s.competitor_record_id = #{competitorId} ORDER BY t.submit_time DESC
